content: Documentation Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Dashboard Take charge of your salon’s growth with the daSalon Dashboard. Track appointments, sales, clients, reviews, and goals in one place with powerful insights designed for beauty and wellness businesses. Calendar and schedule Take charge of your schedule with daSalon. Manage appointments, team availability, and resources in one place with a flexible calendar built for beauty and wellness businesses. Sales and checkout Streamline your front-desk with daSalon. Track sales, apply discounts, manage payment methods, and complete checkouts seamlessly—all in one smart system designed for salons and wellness businesses. Catalog Manage all your salon offerings in one place. From services to retail products and packages, daSalon helps you organize your catalog efficiently for both staff and clients.
title: Documentation

content: Clients Keep track of your client details, appointment history, preferences, and communication all in one place. Whether you're adding new clients, updating existing profiles, or reviewing visit records, daSalon makes client management simple and organized. Staff Empower your staff with tools to manage availability, shifts, and responsibilities effortlessly. From assigning appointments and customizing working hours to tracking performance, daSalon helps you organize your team and keep your business running smoothly. Offers Create compelling offers to attract and retain clients. Whether it’s vouchers, memberships, promo codes, or gift cards—daSalon helps you configure and manage promotional tools that drive business growth. Payment Easily manage and track all payment transactions made by clients. From collecting payments at checkout to reviewing payment history, daSalon offers transparent and organized payment handling for your salon.
title: Documentation

content: Promote Boost your salon’s visibility and attract new clients with daSalon’s promotion tools. From social sharing to running ads, we help you market smarter and grow faster. Report Empower your staff with tools to manage availability, shifts, and responsibilities effortlessly. From assigning appointments and customizing working hours to tracking performance, daSalon helps you organize your team and keep your business running smoothly. Review Learn how to view, manage, and respond to client reviews. Monitor client satisfaction and showcase top feedback on your salon profile to build credibility. Settings Configure and personalize your salon account settings. From business hours and venue details to tax settings and notification preferences, daSalon gives you full control over your setup.
title: Documentation

title: Dashboard - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Calendar and schedule Take charge of your schedule with daSalon. Manage appointments, team availability, and resources in one place with a flexible calendar built for beauty and wellness businesses. Appointments In this guide, you’ll learn how to schedule appointments into your da Salon calendar. Create appointments Start scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information. Update appointments Make changes to existing appointments, such as updating service details, changing team members, or adjusting duration to reflect client needs. Reschedule appointments Easily move appointments to a different date or time while keeping clients informed and your calendar up to date.
title: Calendar and schedule - Documentation

content: Cancel appointments Cancel appointments in just a few clicks with the option to notify clients and track cancellations for better schedule management. Complete appointments Mark appointments as complete to finalize the visit, trigger follow-ups, and maintain accurate client records and service history. No-Show appointments Helps analyze client reliability, avoid no-show patterns, and plan future bookings better. Delete appointments Keeps your records clean without losing important business data Calendar Learn how to effectively manage and schedule client appointments using the da Salon calendar — including booking, rescheduling, and handling staff availability. Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Start scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information. Pick Date Range See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings.
title: Calendar and schedule - Documentation

content: Switch Between Day or Week View Zoom into a single day for detailed appointment slots or step back and see the full week’s schedule across your team. Click Any Appointment for Full Control Manage all aspects of an appointment — from editing and rescheduling to canceling, deleting, and checking out. Calendar and schedule - Documentation
title: Calendar and schedule - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Create appointments Start scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information. Create an appointment From the main page, look at the left-hand menu and click on Appointments to open the appointments section. On the Appointments page, locate the “Add Appointment” button in the top right corner. Click this "Add Appointments" to open the appointment creation panel. In the appointment creation panel, click Customer to: Select an existing client Create a new client Leave it as a walk-in appointment Click on Venue to select the location where the service will be provided.
title: Create appointments

content: Select a service from the list to add it to the appointment: Select one or more services offered at the selected venue To customize service details, simply click on the edit option in the corner of the selected service. Once all details are filled in, click the Create Appointment button at the bottom of the panel. Your new appointment will now appear in the calendar view, assigned to the selected staff and time. More questions about this Q1. How do I edit an appointment? Go to your calendar, click on the appointment, and select 'Edit'. Make your changes and save. Q2. Can I create a recurring appointment? Yes, select the repeat option when creating the appointment and set the desired frequency. Table of Contents Create an appointment More questions about this Create appointments - Documentation
title: Create appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Update appointments Make changes to existing appointments, such as updating service details, changing team members, or adjusting duration to reflect client needs. Update a client appointment Navigate to the Appointments section from the left-hand menu. In the appointment list: Click ⋮ > Edit from the desired appointment row OR open the appointment detail panel → click ⋮ > Edit OR click directly on the appointment block in the calendar view Update the necessary fields such as: Service Assigned Staff Time & Date Notes or client details Click Update Appointment to save your changes.
title: Update appointments

content: The changes will reflect immediately in your calendar and the client will be notified if applicable. Important : Editing an appointment does not affect the original record history. All updates are logged for audit purposes. More questions about this Q1. Can I change the staff assigned? Yes. While editing, you can assign a different staff member if they're available at the chosen time. Q2. Will the client be notified after changes? Yes, clients will receive notifications about any updates based on your salon’s notification settings. Table of Contents Update a client appointment More questions about this Update appointments - Documentation
title: Update appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Reschedule appointments Easily move appointments to a different date or time while keeping clients informed and your calendar up to date. Reschedule Appointment Purpose : Change the date/time of an appointment due to client or staff needs. Go to the Appointments section from the sidebar. Click ⋮ → Reschedule from the appointment row. OR Click on the Appointment ID Then click ⋮ → Reschedule from the side panel. A reschedule prompt will appear. Select a new date and/or time Click Reschedule to save. A confirmation message shows the appointment has been rescheduled. Tip : Avoid last-minute reschedules if your salon has a cancellation/rescheduling policy.
title: Reschedule appointments

content: More questions about this? Q1. Can I reschedule a completed appointment? No. Only upcoming appointments can be rescheduled. Table of Contents More questions about this? Reschedule appointments - Documentation
title: Reschedule appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Cancel appointments Cancel appointments in just a few clicks with the option to notify clients and track cancellations for better schedule management. Cancel a client appointment Navigate to the Appointments section from the left-hand menu. In the appointment list: Click ⋮ > Cancel from the desired appointment row OR open the appointment detail panel → click ⋮ > Cancel OR click Edit and change the status to "Cancelled" A prompt will appear asking for a reason . Choose from pre-filled suggestions like “Unwell” or “Emergency” Or write your own custom reason Click Cancel Appointment to confirm.
title: Cancel appointments

content: The status of the appointment will now appear in red . Important : A cancelled appointment is never deleted. It stays in the system for analytics, reporting, and audit purposes. More questions about this Q1. Can I undo a cancellation? No. Once cancelled, the appointment remains in the system but cannot be restored. You’ll need to create a new appointment. Q2. Will the client be notified? Yes, clients receive cancellation notifications based on your notification settings. Table of Contents Cancel a client appointment More questions about this Cancel appointments - Documentation
title: Cancel appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Complete appointments Mark appointments as complete to finalize the visit, trigger follow-ups, and maintain accurate client records and service history. Mark a client appointment as complete Navigate to the Appointments section from the left-hand menu. In the appointment list: Click ⋮ > Edit and change status to Completed OR open the appointment detail panel → change status to Completed OR use the status dropdown in the row and select Completed OR click Checkout after finishing the service Click Update/Save if using the edit form. The status of the appointment will now appear in green .
title: Complete appointments

content: Important : A completed appointment updates reports, dashboards, and ensures staff payout is correctly recorded. More questions about this Q1. Can I mark it as completed later? Yes, you can return and mark an appointment as completed at any time from the Appointments list or detail view. Q2. Will the client be notified? No, marking an appointment as completed does not notify the client. Table of Contents Mark a client appointment as complete More questions about this Complete appointments - Documentation
title: Complete appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar No-Show appointments Helps analyze client reliability, avoid no-show patterns, and plan future bookings better. No-Show Appointment Purpose : Record when a client doesn’t show up. Important for tracking client reliability and blocking last-minute gaps. Open Appointments . Click ⋮ → Edit or From status dropdown Edit panel → change status Appointment ID panel Select No-Show . Click Update . Appointment turns Grey More questions about this Q1. Why mark an appointment as No-Show? It helps track client behavior and avoid income gaps by addressing missed bookings. Q2.
title: No-Show appointments

content: Can I revert a No-Show status? Yes, you can reopen the appointment and update the status as needed. Table of Contents No-Show Appointment More questions about this No-Show appointments - Documentation
title: No-Show appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Create appointments Update appointments Reschedule appointments Cancel appointments Complete appointments No-Show appointments Delete appointments Calendar Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Delete appointments Keeps your records clean without losing important business data Delete Appointment Purpose : Permanently remove the appointment. Only allowed if the appointment is in New , Confirmed , or No-Show status. Go to Appointments . For eligible statuses, Row menu → click ⋮ → Delete -OR open the detail panel → ⋮ → Delete Completed and Cancelled appointments cannot be deleted. A confirmation popup appears. Click Confirm Delete , a success message will confirm the deletion. Deleted records will no longer show in reports or history. More questions about this Q1.
title: Delete appointments

content: Can I undo a deleted appointment? No, deleted appointments are permanently removed and can’t be restored. Q2. Why can’t I delete a completed appointment? Completed and Cancelled appointments are locked for reporting and cannot be deleted. Table of Contents Delete Appointment More questions about this Delete appointments - Documentation
title: Delete appointments

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Calendar Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Pick Date Range Switch Between Day or Week View Click Any Appointment for Full Control Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Start scheduling appointments with detailed client and service information. Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Purpose : Easily find specific appointments and manage your schedule with precision. Filtering by Venue Use this when you want to see appointments for a specific salon branch. Navigate to Calendar From the dashboard, click on the Calendar option in the left sidebar. Access the Filter Options Once on the Calendar page, look at the top navigation bar near the "Calendar" heading. You’ll see three filter dropdowns: Venue , Staff , and Status . Click the first dropdown labeled Venue .
title: Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status

content: Choose a Venue A dropdown list of all available salon venues will appear. Select the venue you want to view. View Results The calendar now refreshes to show only appointments scheduled at the selected venue . This helps you focus on a single location's activities. Clear the Filter To reset the view, simply click the Venue dropdown again and either: Click the same venue again to deselect, or Select "All Venues" or leave the field empty (depending on system behavior). Filtering by Staff Use this when you want to focus on one team member’s appointments. Open the Calendar From the main page, click Calendar in the left sidebar. Select the Staff Filter On the top navigation of the Calendar page, click the second dropdown , which is labeled Staff . Choose a Staff Member A dropdown list will appear showing all active staff. Click the name of the team member whose schedule you want to check. View Results The calendar will now show only appointments assigned to that staff member .
title: Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status

content: Clear the Filter To remove the filter, click the Staff dropdown again and reset it to show all staff schedules. Filtering by Appointment Status Use this to filter by appointment state like Confirmed, Cancelled, etc. Go to Calendar Open the Calendar page from the left navigation menu. Click on the Status Dropdown On the top right, next to Venue and Staff filters, you’ll see the third dropdown – Status . Select a Status Available status options include: New – Recently created appointments awaiting confirmation Confirmed – Approved appointments scheduled by the salon Completed – Services already completed Cancelled – Appointments canceled by the salon or client No Show – Appointments missed by the client without cancellation View the Filtered Results The calendar will update to display appointments matching only the selected status , giving you a clear snapshot. Clear the Filter Click the Status dropdown again and reset it by deselecting or choosing "All Statuses".
title: Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status

content: More questions about this Q1. Can I combine filters? Yes, you can apply multiple filters (e.g., venue + staff + status) at once to find exactly what you’re looking for. Q2. Why are no appointments showing after applying filters? This could happen if the selected filters don’t match any records. Try resetting the filters or adjusting the criteria. Table of Contents Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Filtering by Venue Filtering by Staff Filtering by Appointment Status More questions about this Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status - Documentation
title: Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Calendar Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Pick Date Range Switch Between Day or Week View Click Any Appointment for Full Control Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Pick Date Range See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings. Pick Date Ranges Easily Purpose : See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings. Open the Calendar On the main dashboard, click on Calendar in the left-side menu. Find the Date Controls At the top-left of the calendar page, below the filters , you’ll see three date control buttons: Previous Today Next View Previous Appointments Click the Previous button to scroll back and view appointments from earlier days.
title: Pick Date Range

content: View Upcoming Appointments Click the Next button to scroll ahead and see what’s coming up in the following days. Jump to Today’s Appointments The Today button is highlighted by default. If you’ve scrolled away, click it anytime to come back to today’s bookings. Pick a Custom Date Range In the center-top of the calendar , click on the displayed date (e.g., “15 Jun 2025”) A date picker opens. You can now select: A start date and an end date The calendar will refresh and display appointments within that range Tip for First-Time Users : This is especially helpful when you're reviewing past performance , tracking busy periods , or checking future availability . More questions about this Q1. Can I view appointments from last month? Yes, use the date picker to go back and choose any range from the past. Q2. Does this affect my reports? No, this is only for viewing appointments. Reports are generated separately.
title: Pick Date Range

content: Table of Contents Pick Date Ranges Easily More questions about this Pick Date Range - Documentation
title: Pick Date Range

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Calendar Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Pick Date Range Switch Between Day or Week View Click Any Appointment for Full Control Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Switch Between Day or Week View Zoom into a single day for detailed appointment slots or step back and see the full week’s schedule across your team. Switch Between Day or Week View Purpose : Zoom into a single day for detailed appointment slots or step back and see the full week’s schedule across your team. Go to Calendar From the main sidebar, click on Calendar .
title: Switch Between Day or Week View

content: Locate the View Toggle In the top-right corner of the calendar, you'll see two options: Day View Week View View by Day (Default) Click Day to view: Staff timelines by the hour Time gaps to add more bookings Real-time visibility into each slot View by Week Click Week to get: A full week overview How appointments are distributed Workload comparison across staff Switch Anytime Toggle between the two as needed based on planning or operations. Tip : Use Day View for deep planning or when managing walk-ins. Use Week View to spot trends, balance workloads, or fill underbooked days. More questions about this Q1. Can I see both day and week views together? No, you can only view one mode at a time — either Day or Week — but you can switch anytime. Q2. Will switching views affect my appointments? Not at all. The views only change how your calendar is displayed. Appointments remain unaffected.
title: Switch Between Day or Week View

content: Table of Contents Switch Between Day or Week View More questions about this Switch Between Day or Week View - Documentation
title: Switch Between Day or Week View

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Appointments Calendar Filter by Venue, Staff, or Status Pick Date Range Switch Between Day or Week View Click Any Appointment for Full Control Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Click Any Appointment for Full Control Manage all aspects of an appointment — from editing and rescheduling to canceling, deleting, and checking out. Click Any Appointment for Full Control Purpose : Manage all aspects of an appointment — from editing and rescheduling to canceling, deleting, and checking out. Go to Calendar From the left sidebar, click Calendar . Open Appointment Details In the calendar grid, find and click on any booked appointment . A detailed panel will slide open on the right. Update or Edit Appointment Click the three-dot menu (⋮) at the top-right of the detail panel Choose Edit Modify client, service, date/time, or assigned staff Save the updated details.
title: Click Any Appointment for Full Control

content: Reschedule the Appointment Either: Click Reschedule at the bottom of the panel, or Use the three-dot menu > Reschedule Select new date/time and confirm Cancel the Appointment Click the three-dot menu > Cancel Choose or enter a reason for cancellation Delete the Appointment (if allowed) Click three-dot menu > Delete Confirm deletion when prompted Change Appointment Status Locate the status button at the top-left of the panel Click and change to: New Confirmed Completed No-Show Cancelled Checkout the Appointment Scroll down and click Checkout This redirects you to the Sales Page where payment is processed Tip for First-Time Users : You can manage everything without leaving the calendar — saves time and helps avoid missing details. More questions about this Q1. Can I undo a cancelled appointment? No, but you can manually reschedule it or rebook a new appointment with the same details. Q2. Does deleting remove it from reports? Yes.
title: Click Any Appointment for Full Control

content: Deleted appointments are not shown in history or reports. Table of Contents Click Any Appointment for Full Control More questions about this Click Any Appointment for Full Control - Documentation
title: Click Any Appointment for Full Control

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales and checkout Streamline your front-desk with daSalon. Track sales, apply discounts, manage payment methods, and complete checkouts seamlessly—all in one smart system designed for salons and wellness businesses. Point of Sale Learn how to process client payments, apply discounts, and manage walk-in and booked checkouts using daSalon’s Point of Sale system. Create a sale Quickly create a new sale by selecting services, assigning staff, and adding client details—all from one simple checkout interface. Search & Filter Options Quickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date. Refund a sale Process full or partial refunds effortlessly, with options to return services, products, or adjust payment methods.
title: Sales and checkout - Documentation

content: Void a sale Remove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. Cannot be undone. Edit a sale Change the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation. Share Invoice Share sale receipts via email, download, or view invoice. View Sale & Client Details Check sale history and client activity in detail. Sales-Category Understand how to categorize your salon services and products for accurate sales tracking, reporting, and promotional strategies. Sales-Services To record and manage all service-related sales like spa treatments, haircuts, or other service offerings, including edits, refunds, and invoice tracking. Sales-Packages To handle bundled service offerings like bridal or facial packages, allowing users to sell, edit, refund, or void packages and track client info. Sales–Book A Look To manage sales of consultation or visual preview services where clients book styling previews or consultations before a full service.
title: Sales and checkout - Documentation

content: Sales–Products To track and process sales of retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and other beauty-related merchandise, including refunds and inventory checks. Sales-Offer Explore how to configure and apply offers like discounts, memberships, and vouchers during the checkout to drive customer retention. Sales–Vouchers To manage the sale of promotional or prepaid vouchers that clients can redeem for services, including tracking usage and handling edits or refunds. Sales–Memberships To handle membership plan purchases and renewals, monitor benefit usage, and manage changes such as refunds or cancellations. Sales–Gift Cards To issue and manage gift card sales, including tracking card usage, expiry dates, and making adjustments like refunds or voids. Sales and checkout - Documentation
title: Sales and checkout - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Create a sale Quickly create a new sale by selecting services, assigning staff, and adding client details—all from one simple checkout interface. Create a Sale Purpose : Record walk-in or booked sales, assign services/products, and handle payments. From the Sales page , click "Add Sale" in the top-right corner. A side panel opens with two main sections: ![add](/assets/picture/sales/pointof-sale/create/create2 (1).png) Left Panel : Choose Customer Type : Walk-in (default), Existing Client, or Add New Client. Select Venue from the dropdown. Add items: Appointments, Services, Packages, Vouchers, Memberships, Gift Cards .
title: Create a sale

content: Right Panel : View cart items, subtotal, taxes, discount (promo code), tip, and total. Assign staff, add notes, and choose payment method. Click Continue to Payment and select: Full Payment → Paid Sale Partial Payment → Partially Paid No Payment → Unpaid Sale Click Complete Sale . A confirmation message will appear. Tip for First-Time Users : Use this feature to keep track of all transactions, even for walk-in clients or quick sales that are not linked to an appointment. More questions about this Q1. Can I add multiple services to a sale? Yes, you can add as many services, products, or vouchers as needed before completing the sale. Q2. Will the sale be reflected in reports immediately? Yes, once the sale is completed, it will appear in your real-time sales reports. Table of Contents Create a Sale More questions about this Create a sale - Documentation
title: Create a sale

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Search & Filter Options Quickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date. Search and Filter Options Purpose : Quickly find any sale using ID, status, price range, or date. Go to the Sidebar Click on Sales page in the left-side navigation menu. Locate the Search and Filter Controls At the top-left of the Sales page, you’ll find: Search Bar : Type in the Sale ID to locate a specific sale. Filter Buttons : Status Filter : Choose from Paid, Unpaid, Partially Paid, Exchanged, Refunded, Voided. Total Value Filter : Set a min/max price to narrow by sale value. Created At Filter : Pick a specific date or date range to find sales within that time.
title: Search & Filter Options

content: Apply the Filters Click the filter buttons, input your criteria, and the results will update instantly. Reset Filters if Needed To remove filters, click the filter again or clear the values you’ve entered. Tip for First-Time Users : This is great for auditing , tracking high-value clients , or quickly reviewing recent or old sales . More questions about this Q1. Can I filter by both date and price together? Yes, you can combine multiple filters at once for even more precise results. Q2. Will this affect my reports or revenue? No, these are only for viewing and searching purposes. Your reports remain unchanged. Table of Contents Search and Filter Options More questions about this Search & Filter Options - Documentation
title: Search & Filter Options

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Refund a sale Process full or partial refunds effortlessly, with options to return services, products, or adjust payment methods. Refund sale Purpose : Refund a paid sale fully or partially if the customer is unsatisfied or overcharged. In the refund panel: - Select specific items to refund. - Choose Refund Method : Cash, Card, Other. - Assign Staff issuing the refund. - Add Refund Reason : e.g., Overcharge, Unsatisfactory service, Duplicate booking. Purpose: Refund a paid sale fully or partially if the customer is unsatisfied or overcharged. Steps: Go to Sales page , click on a Sale ID to open its detail panel.
title: Refund a sale

content: Click the three-dot menu (⋮) in the top-right → Select "Refund Sale" . Refund option appears only for Paid Sales . Click Issue Refund . Confirmation message will appear. Tip for First-Time Users : This is especially helpful when you're reviewing past performance , tracking busy periods , or checking future availability . More questions about this Q1. Can I view appointments from last month? Yes, use the date picker to go back and choose any range from the past. Q2. Does this affect my reports? No, this is only for viewing appointments. Reports are generated separately. Was this article helpful? 👍 👎 Table of Contents Refund sale Purpose: Refund a paid sale fully or partially if the customer is unsatisfied or overcharged. Steps: More questions about this Refund a sale - Documentation
title: Refund a sale

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Void a sale Remove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. Cannot be undone. Void a Sale Purpose : Remove an incorrect sale permanently from reports. Cannot be undone. From Sales page , click on a Sale ID Click three-dot menu (⋮) → "Void Sale" A warning message appears: Confirms deletion of sale and payment. Click Void Sale to proceed Now marked as Voided in the sales list. Tip for First-Time Users : Use this only for completely incorrect transactions. Once voided, the sale is removed from all reports and can't be recovered. More questions about this Q1.
title: Void a sale

content: Can I undo a voided sale? No, once a sale is voided, it is permanently removed and cannot be restored. Q2. Will the voided sale affect my totals? No, once a sale is voided, it is excluded from all total revenue and reports. Table of Contents Void a Sale More questions about this Void a sale - Documentation
title: Void a sale

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Edit a sale Change the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation. Edit Sale Purpose : Change the assigned staff or update sale details post-creation. From Sales page , click on a Sale ID . In the detail panel, click ⋮ > Edit Sale . Update : Assigned staff Tip amount Payment info Click Save Changes to apply the updates. Tip for First-Time Users : Editing a sale ensures staff and payment details are accurate for reports and financial tracking. More questions about this Q1. Can I change the payment method after editing? Yes, you can update the payment info along with staff or tips. Q2.
title: Edit a sale

content: Will clients be notified when I edit the sale? No, editing a sale is an internal action. Clients are not notified. Table of Contents Edit Sale More questions about this Edit a sale - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Share Invoice Share sale receipts via email, download, or view invoice. Share Invoice Purpose : Share sale receipts via email, download, or view invoice. In Sales, click on the Sale ID Open the Sales page section from the main menu and select the Sale ID of the invoice you wish to share. Click the "Share Invoice" button At the top of the detail panel, click the "Share Invoice" button.
title: Share Invoice

content: Choose sharing method Select from the following options: Email PDF download Copy invoice link Invoice details included The shared invoice includes: Client information Services Pricing Discounts Taxes Payment method Tip for First-Time Users : This feature helps streamline client communication and maintain accurate records of each transaction. More questions about this Q1. Can I share old invoices too? Yes, you can share invoices from previous transactions at any time. Q2. Is this secure for client data? Yes, invoice links are secure and only visible to those with access to the shared link or email. Table of Contents Share Invoice More questions about this Share Invoice - Documentation
title: Share Invoice

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Create a sale Search & Filter Options Refund a sale Void a sale Edit a sale Share Invoice View Sale & Client Details Sales-Category Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar View Sale & Client Details Check sale history and client activity in detail. View Sale and Client Details Purpose : Check sale history and client activity in detail. View Sale Details Click on Sale ID . The detail panel shows: Services/products sold Membership or voucher details Tax, discount, payment, and activity log View Client Details Click on Client Name . Panel shows: Contact info Purchase history Memberships, vouchers, and usage history Tip for First-Time Users : Use this feature to understand client purchasing behavior and follow up on sales insights. More questions about this Q1.
title: View Sale & Client Details

content: Can I see past purchases of a client? Yes, client panels show their complete purchase and activity history. Q2. Can I export these details? You can export sales reports from the Reports section for deeper insights. Table of Contents View Sale and Client Details More questions about this View Sale & Client Details - Documentation
title: View Sale & Client Details

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Services Sales-Packages Sales–Book A Look Sales–Products Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales-Services To record and manage all service-related sales like spa treatments, haircuts, or other service offerings, including edits, refunds, and invoice tracking. Service Sales Purpose : Manage, add, edit, and refund service sales like haircuts or spa treatments. Navigate to Sales On the main dashboard , look to the left sidebar menu and click on Sales page . Go to Services Tab Inside the Sales section, at the top or tab menu , you’ll see a navigation option labeled “Services” – click on it to enter the Service Sales view. Browse Service Sales On this page, you’ll find a list of all sales related to services like haircuts, facials, or spa treatments.
title: Sales-Services

content: Add a New Service Sale Click on the “Add Sale” button usually at the top-right corner of the page. In the opened panel, choose customer type, venue, and select the service(s) from the list to add to the cart. You can then proceed to apply discounts, assign staff, and complete payment via your preferred method. Edit Existing Sale Click on the Sale ID or open the three-dot (⋮) menu at the end of the sale row and choose “Edit Sale” . Issue a Refund Click on the Sale ID → open the three-dot menu → select “Refund” , and proceed through the refund process. Void a Sale Follow the same path and select “Void Sale” from the menu. Additional Options You can also share the invoice , and view both sales and client details directly from this tab. Tip for First-Time Users : Service Sales lets you track treatments and staff performance easily, and handle any after-sale corrections efficiently. More questions about this Q1.
title: Sales-Services

content: Can I edit a sale after it’s completed? Yes, use the Edit Sale option from the ⋮ menu next to the sale entry. Q2. Where can I find the invoice? In the sale detail panel, use the share button to download or email the invoice. Table of Contents Service Sales More questions about this Sales-Services - Documentation
title: Sales-Services

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Services Sales-Packages Sales–Book A Look Sales–Products Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales-Packages To handle bundled service offerings like bridal or facial packages, allowing users to sell, edit, refund, or void packages and track client info. Package Sales Purpose : Learn how to view, add, and manage package sales (e.g., bridal or facial bundles) using the Sales section. Go to the Sales Section From the main dashboard , click on Sales page in the sidebar. Open the Packages Tab In the Sales section, locate the top navigation tab labeled “Packages” and click on it. View All Package Sales This section shows all the sales made for service packages (e.g., bridal packages, facial bundles, etc.). Add a New Package Sale Click on “Add Sale” to initiate a new package sale.
title: Sales-Packages

content: Fill Sale Details Select the venue , add the package , assign a client and staff , and complete the sale using your preferred payment method . Edit Existing Sale To edit an existing sale , click the Sale ID or use the three-dot menu and select “Edit Sale” . Refund or Void a Sale To refund or void a package sale, use the Sale ID or three-dot menu options. Share and View Details Easily share invoices , and view detailed sale or client information from the same tab. Tip for First-Time Users : Tracking package sales regularly helps in analyzing client demand, seasonal package success, and revenue optimization. More questions about this Q1. Can I edit or refund a package sale later? Yes, go to the Packages tab, use the three-dot menu or Sale ID to access edit and refund options. Q2. Will this show in client history? Yes, all package sales are recorded in the client’s history for future reference and reporting.
title: Sales-Packages

content: Table of Contents Package Sales More questions about this Sales-Packages - Documentation
title: Sales-Packages

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Services Sales-Packages Sales–Book A Look Sales–Products Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales–Book A Look To manage sales of consultation or visual preview services where clients book styling previews or consultations before a full service. Book A Look Sales Purpose : See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings. Begin at the Dashboard Click on Sales page in the left menu. Select Book A Look In the Sales tab section, choose “Book A Look” . View Sales List This page lists all the visual or consultation-based bookings . Add a New Sale Click on “Add Sale” , choose Book A Look from the available options, fill out required details, and proceed. Edit, Refund or Void a Sale Use the three-dot menu on the sale row or click into the Sale ID .
title: Sales–Book A Look

content: Access Client and Sale History You can also share invoices , and view client/sale history from this panel. Tip for First-Time Users : This is especially helpful when you're reviewing past performance , tracking busy periods , or checking future availability . More questions about this Q1. Can I view appointments from last month? Yes, use the date picker to go back and choose any range from the past. Q2. Does this affect my reports? No, this is only for viewing appointments. Reports are generated separately. Table of Contents Book A Look Sales More questions about this Sales–Book A Look - Documentation
title: Sales–Book A Look

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Services Sales-Packages Sales–Book A Look Sales–Products Sales-Offer Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales–Products To track and process sales of retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and other beauty-related merchandise, including refunds and inventory checks. Product Sales Purpose : See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings. On the dashboard , click on Sales page . In the top tabs, click “Products” to view all product sales (e.g., shampoos, conditioners, beauty tools). Click “Add Sale” to start a new sale involving products. Select the product , quantity, client, and payment method. To edit a product sale , click into the Sale ID or three-dot menu and choose “Edit Sale” . Use the same menu to refund or void a product sale.
title: Sales–Products

content: You can view invoice , client details , and track product quantities from this screen. More questions about this Q1. Can I view appointments from last month? Yes, use the date picker to go back and choose any range from the past. Q2. Does this affect my reports? No, this is only for viewing appointments. Reports are generated separately. Table of Contents Product Sales More questions about this Sales–Products - Documentation

Voucher Sales Purpose : See appointments for today, previous days, upcoming days, or pick a custom date range to view past or future bookings. In the main menu , click on Sales page . Inside the Sales module, switch to the “Vouchers” tab. This section shows all sales involving gift vouchers or promotional vouchers . To add a new voucher sale , click “Add Sale” , select a voucher, and complete the form with client and payment. Click on the Sale ID or the three-dot menu to edit , refund , or void the voucher.

Tip for First-Time Users : This is especially helpful when you're reviewing past performance , tracking busy periods , or checking future availability . More questions about this Q1. content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Offer Sales–Vouchers Sales–Memberships Sales–Gift Cards Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales–Memberships To handle membership plan purchases and renewals, monitor benefit usage, and manage changes such as refunds or cancellations. Membership Sales Purpose : View and manage all membership purchases, whether active or expired. Navigate to Sales From the main sidebar, click on Sales page . Select the “Memberships” tab This section displays both active and expired membership purchases . Add a Membership Sale Click “Add Sale” , choose a membership plan, and assign it to a client. Edit, Refund, or Void Memberships Use the three-dot menu or Sale ID on each entry to perform these actions. Review Expiry Dates and Benefits Each entry shows expiry date, benefits, and usage history.
title: Sales–Memberships

content: Access Invoices and Client History Related invoices and full client usage can be accessed directly. Tip for Owners : Use this section regularly to track client activity and ensure memberships are being utilized. More questions about this Q1. Can I assign a membership to an existing client? Yes, during the “Add Sale” process, search and select an existing client from your database. Q2. Can I refund a partially used membership? Yes, partial or full refunds can be issued based on your policy. Check with your admin settings. Table of Contents Membership Sales More questions about this Sales–Memberships - Documentation
title: Sales–Memberships

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Point of Sale Sales-Category Sales-Offer Sales–Vouchers Sales–Memberships Sales–Gift Cards Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Sales–Gift Cards To issue and manage gift card sales, including tracking card usage, expiry dates, and making adjustments like refunds or voids. Giftcard Sales Purpose : View, manage, and issue gift cards. Track usage, process refunds, and monitor expiry. Go to Sales On the dashboard, click on Sales page in the left-side menu. Open Gift Cards Tab Click on the “Gift Cards” tab at the top of the Sales page. View Existing Sales All purchased gift cards and their current usage status are listed here. Add a New Sale Click “Add Sale” to issue a new gift card to a customer. Enter Sale Details Select the gift card amount , client, and venue. Complete the sale using a valid payment method.
title: Sales–Gift Cards

content: Edit or Refund Sales To make changes, click the Sale ID or open the action menu and choose Edit , Refund , or Void Sale . Track Gift Card Usage Monitor how much value has been used and check expiry dates directly on this screen. View Full Client Info Access full client sales details and share invoices if needed. Tip for First-Time Users : Gift cards are a great way to boost upfront revenue and bring back repeat clients. More questions about this Q1. Can I refund a gift card? Yes, use the menu next to the sale and choose "Refund" to process it. Q2. Will the client be notified after sale? Yes, a confirmation and gift card code will be sent automatically to the client. Table of Contents Giftcard Sales More questions about this Sales–Gift Cards - Documentation
title: Sales–Gift Cards

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Service Book a look Packages Products Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Catalog Manage all your salon offerings in one place. From services to retail products and packages, daSalon helps you organize your catalog efficiently for both staff and clients. Service Learn how to create, manage, and categorize individual salon services including pricing, duration, and visibility settings. Create a New Service Allows salons to flexibly add services for different needs and client types. Makes your offerings dynamic and easy to manage. Edit Service Keeps your service list up-to-date with changes in staff, pricing, or trends. Delete services Easily remove outdated or discontinued services from your menu while keeping your offerings fresh and relevant.
title: Catalog - Documentation

content: Book a look Discover how to create curated service combinations for special occasions like weddings, parties, or photoshoots to boost bookings. Create a Book a Look Great for marketing and helps clients feel inspired when choosing services. A visual approach to booking. Edit Book a Look Keeps your style gallery fresh and relevant. View Book a Look Know which styles are trending and who’s providing them. Delete Book a Lookk Remove old or less popular looks to maintain a clean and updated catalog. Packages Understand how to bundle multiple services into value-driven packages to increase client retention and simplify promotions. Create a Package Clients get more value. You earn more per visit. Edit Package Keep up with seasonal offers or staff changes. View Package Details Helps you track which packages are popular and who handles them. Delete Package Remove outdated or unused packages.
title: Catalog - Documentation

content: Products Learn how to add and manage retail products such as shampoos, conditioners, and styling tools that you sell at your salon. Create a Product Build a product catalog that works for both in-store and online selling. Edit Product Adjust for new stock, pricing updates, or changes in availability. View Product Details Helps you track inventory and sales performance in real-time. Delete Product Remove outdated product. Catalog - Documentation
title: Catalog - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Client Profile Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Clients Keep track of your client details, appointment history, preferences, and communication all in one place. Whether you're adding new clients, updating existing profiles, or reviewing visit records, daSalon makes client management simple and organized. Client Profile Learn how to add, edit, and manage client profiles with personal details, visit notes, preferred services, and contact information—all from one centralized view. Create client profiles Capturing complete and accurate client info ensures smooth appointment booking, personalized communication, and better tracking. Update client details Ensures client records stay up-to-date, especially if they move, change contact details, or provide special instructions.
title: Clients - Documentation

content: View Client Details Helps you understand the client’s purchase habits, loyalty, and preferences—perfect for offering customized services or promotions. Add Appointment from Client Page Saves time! No need to search the client again when booking—it’s all linked and ready to go. Add Sale from Client Page Track wallet balances, issue store credits, and manage client loyalty rewards or points directly from their profile. Block clients Helps you handle misuse, no-shows, or policy violations. Maintain control over who can access your services. Unblock clients Offers flexibility. You can easily re-enable clients without losing their history or records. Clients - Documentation
title: Clients - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Staff Details Attendance Leave Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Staff Empower your staff with tools to manage availability, shifts, and responsibilities effortlessly. From assigning appointments and customizing working hours to tracking performance, daSalon helps you organize your team and keep your business running smoothly. Staff Details Learn how to add new staff members, set roles, assign services, and manage contact and employment information from one centralized dashboard. Add a Staff Member - Keeps complete profiles for each team member. Easily assign responsibilities Edit Staff Details Keep info accurate, update job roles, change commission strategy View Staff Details Helps in performance reviews, salary calculations, and client assignment logic.
title: Staff - Documentation

content: Attendance Track daily staff attendance, login/logout times, and monitor punctuality with daSalon’s built-in attendance tracking system. Add Attendance Ensures accurate payroll, monitors punctuality, tracks work hours and availability View Attendance Review historical attendance records, investigate lateness or leave patterns Leave Manage staff leaves with ease—approve or reject time-off requests, set leave policies, and view leave history for better scheduling. Add Leave Schedule staff shifts around leaves, maintain service quality during absences Edit Leave Adjust plans due to changes or mistakes in leave details Delete Leave Clean up incorrect or duplicate entries Staff - Documentation
title: Staff - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Voucher Membership Promo Code Gift cards Payment Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Offers Create compelling offers to attract and retain clients. Whether it’s vouchers, memberships, promo codes, or gift cards—daSalon helps you configure and manage promotional tools that drive business growth. Voucher Set up service-based or amount-based vouchers to attract new clients or reward loyal ones. Customize validity, usage, and pricing with ease. Create Voucher Promotes prepaid bookings and encourages multiple visits. It builds loyalty and guarantees future business. Edit Voucher Keep vouchers aligned with changing offerings or new pricing strategies. View Voucher Details Track performance and client behavior to see what works best. Delete Voucher Remove outdated offers to maintain a clean catalog.
title: Offers - Documentation

content: Membership Create recurring membership plans with session-based or unlimited services. Offer clients exclusive access, perks, and long-term value. Create memberships Offers elite experience to your loyal clients and creates consistent recurring revenue for your salon. Edit Membership Tailor your memberships to evolving business goals or special promotions. View Membership Details Monitor how each membership is structured and where it's available. Delete Membership Clean up expired or outdated membership options. Promo Code Generate and manage promo codes for limited-time offers, first-time clients, or seasonal campaigns to boost sales and engagement. Create PromoCode Drives quick decisions and increases urgency to book. Easy to share via SMS or email campaigns. Edit PromoCode Quickly adjust dates, codes, or service scope based on campaign results. View PromoCode Details Helps understand promo performance and track redemption trends.
title: Offers - Documentation

content: Delete PromoCode Keep only valid and live codes to avoid confusion. Gift cards Design and sell digital or physical gift cards with customizable values. Ideal for festive seasons, birthdays, and client referrals. Create a Gift Card To design and launch a new gift card that can be sold to clients either online or in-store. This helps in boosting sales, offering gifting options, and increasing brand engagement. Edit Gift Card To update existing gift card details such as pricing, description, or venue availability. This is useful when offering promotions, correcting information, or adjusting to business changes. View Gift Card Details To review complete gift card information including pricing, availability, and usage history by clients. This helps salon partners monitor sales performance and manage client queries. Delete Gift Card To remove outdated, incorrect, or discontinued gift cards from the offers list. This keeps the catalog clean and avoids client confusion. Offers - Documentation
title: Offers - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Payments Promote Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Payment Easily manage and track all payment transactions made by clients. From collecting payments at checkout to reviewing payment history, daSalon offers transparent and organized payment handling for your salon. Payments Learn how to record, review, and manage client payments—whether they’re made through cash, card, UPI, or other methods. Includes refund handling and receipt generation. Cash Payment Use when the client pays you physically with cash, and you need to record the transaction manually. Card Payment For recording payments made via debit or credit cards using a POS machine at the salon. Online Methods When the client pays digitally using UPI, Google Pay, PhonePe, or Net Banking, and you want to register it in the system.
title: Payment - Documentation

content: Other Payment Use this when payments are made using gift cards, third-party vouchers, promo credits, or any other custom method outside the standard cash/card/online flow. Payment - Documentation
title: Payment - Documentation

content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Get Featured Easy Share Creative Studio Message Center Ad Manager Report Review Settings Toggle Sidebar Promote Boost your salon’s visibility and attract new clients with daSalon’s promotion tools. From social sharing to running ads, we help you market smarter and grow faster. Get Featured In this guide, you’ll learn how to schedule appointments into your da Salon calendar. Add a Get Featured Request To increase visibility and attract more bookings by promoting your salon on da Salon's spotlight section. Approved Status Confirms your campaign is live, so clients start seeing your venue immediately. Completed Status Indicates the featured listing period has ended—helps analyze results and plan future campaigns. Pending Status Lets you plan promotions in advance, ensuring a smooth start when the time comes.
title: Promote - Documentation

content: In Progress Status Notifies that your venue is actively featured and benefiting from increased client visibility. Easy Share Share your salon’s profile, offers, or services directly to WhatsApp, Instagram, or other platforms with auto-generated promotional links and creatives. Create Easy Share Link To quickly generate links clients can use to book services—ideal for WhatsApp, SMS, or Instagram. Use Easy Share Link/QR Makes it easy to promote your salon offline and online with scannable, sharable codes. Creative Studio Access ready-made editable templates for flyers, banners, and social media posts to promote your services and campaigns effectively. Create New Template Allows you to launch a campaign from scratch or a template without hiring a designer. Edit Template Gives full creative control to personalize campaigns and reflect your brand style. Download or Share Makes it easy to publish your creatives across platforms for maximum reach.
title: Promote - Documentation

content: Message Center Communicate with your clients through SMS, WhatsApp, or email campaigns. Send reminders, promotions, and announcements all from one place. Client Engagement Automatically send greetings and welcome messages to clients on special occasions. Appointment Updates – Client Automatically inform clients about appointment status like cancellation, rescheduling, confirmation, and reminders. Appointment Updates – Partner Notify staff about new bookings, cancellations, or rescheduled appointments. Sales Update – Partner Notify salon staff when a client purchases a gift card, voucher, or membership. Sales Update – Client Notify clients when they purchase an item like a voucher, gift card, or membership. Expiry Reminders – Client Remind clients when their gift cards, vouchers, or memberships are nearing expiry. Campaign Messages Launch promotional campaigns for services, offers, and products to a targeted audience. Ad Manager Run targeted ads for your salon directly through daSalon.

content: Choose platforms, set budgets, and track performance—all simplified for salon owners. Add Ad Run targeted social media ads directly from your salon dashboard—no need for external tools. content: Documentation v1.0.0 Documentation Dashboard Calendar and schedule Sales and checkout Catalog Clients Staff Offers Payment Promote Report Review Settings Settings-Venue Venue Monthly Target Venue Subscriptions Billing & Business Management Booking Settings Promotion Management Wallet Toggle Sidebar Settings Configure and personalize your salon account settings. From business hours and venue details to tax settings and notification preferences, daSalon gives you full control over your setup. Settings-Venue Manage your salon’s basic profile including name, address, contact info, business hours, and logo to ensure clients see accurate, up-to-date information. Add venue Set up a dedicated workspace for your salon or business in just a few clicks.
title: Settings - Documentation

content: Customize it with your branding, team, and service offerings to start managing operations from day one Edit venue Easily edit your salon name, contact information, business category, and other key details to keep your profile accurate and professional across client touchpoints. View venue Adjust your business hours anytime to reflect seasonal changes, staff availability, or special events. Ensure clients can always book at the right times. Venue Monthly Target Set and monitor monthly revenue or performance goals for your venue to stay aligned with your business objectives and track progress easily. View Targets Monitor performance goals set for team members or services. Get insights into target achievements, progress, and areas that need attention to improve salon efficiency. Update Targets Modify existing performance targets for staff or services based on new business objectives. Keep your team aligned with updated goals and expectations.
title: Settings - Documentation

content: Add Target Define new sales or service-based targets for staff or departments to boost motivation and track progress effectively over time. Venue Subscriptions View or manage subscription plans associated with your venue to ensure uninterrupted access to daSalon’s services and features. Buy Subscription Explore and purchase the right subscription plan tailored to your salon’s needs. Unlock access to premium features that enhance client management, reporting, and overall business efficiency. View Subscription Check your current subscription status, plan details, and renewal dates. Easily track what features are included and when your subscription is due for renewal or upgrade. Billing & Business Management Configure your billing, business, and tax details to ensure compliance and efficient financial operations across your salon branches. Billing Details Add and manage your billing information such as legal name, address, and contact number for invoices and receipts.
title: Settings - Documentation

content: Keeping billing details updated ensures accurate financial documentation and smoother transactions. Business Details Update your salon’s core information like name, contact info, business type, and operating hours. Keeping your business profile accurate helps maintain trust and professionalism across client interactions. Tax Settings Configure your tax preferences such as GST or VAT based on your location and business model. Enable or disable tax collection for online and offline services to comply with local regulations. Booking Settings Control your online booking preferences such as lead time, rescheduling rules, and slot visibility to match your operational flow. Online Booking Rules Define how clients can book your services online by setting up rules such as lead time, cancellation limits, buffer times, and more. Ensure a smooth and controlled booking experience tailored to your business needs.
title: Settings - Documentation

content: Promotion Management Customize client engagement strategies using birthday and anniversary promotions and gift cards to drive retention and loyalty. Birthday Promotions Create personalized birthday offers to surprise your clients on their special day. Boost loyalty and increase repeat visits with automated birthday campaigns. Anniversary Promotions Celebrate client relationship milestones with exclusive anniversary deals. Learn how to configure automated messages and rewards to drive long-term retention. Gift Card Design and sell digital or printable gift cards that clients can purchase for friends and family. Learn how to set value, customize templates, and track sales. Wallet Manage your daSalon wallet including transactions, venue-level balances, and fund transfers to enable smooth financial tracking and management. Main Wallet Overview Get a complete view of your total balance across all venues.
title: Settings - Documentation

content: Use the Main Wallet to manage funds, make purchases, and track transactions across the platform. View Wallet Details Learn how to access detailed transaction history and balance breakdowns, including credit, debit, and transfer records for better financial clarity. Venue Wallets Each venue has its own wallet to manage earnings individually. Discover how to view, use, or transfer funds from venue-level wallets to the main account. Send Money Transfer funds between your venue wallet and main wallet instantly. This helps streamline promo purchases, payouts, and wallet-based transactions. Withdraw Withdraw available funds from your Main Wallet directly to your registered bank account. Learn about withdrawal limits, timings, and processing steps. Deposit Funds Top-up your Main Wallet to make promotional purchases, run campaigns, or transfer funds to venue wallets. Accepts UPI, net banking, and card payments. Settings - Documentation
title: Settings - Documentation
